summary: Comprehensive testing of Wiki/Documentation system completed. All backend APIs passing (18/18 tests). Frontend functionality working with WYSIWYG editor, article creation, search, filtering, and navigation all functional. Minor UI issue with publish toggle after DOM refresh.

ui_bugs.issue: Element detaches from DOM after edit operation, causing click failure

passed_tests: All wiki API endpoints (create, read, update, delete)
All form fields (title, excerpt, category, author, read_time, tags, featured_image)
Article appears in admin list after creation
Article displays on public wiki page
Article detail page loads with full content
